question: Which team won the 2024 World Series?
explanation: The Dodgers beat the Yankees 4-1 to win the 2024 World Series!

question: Which player hit the most home runs in MLB in 2024?
explanation: Aaron Judge of the Yankees hit 58 home runs in 2024!

question: Which team won the 2023 World Series?
explanation: The Rangers won their first-ever World Series title in 2023!

question: Which player is a superstar who both pitches and hits for the Los Angeles Dodgers?
explanation: Shohei Ohtani is a two-way star who can both pitch and hit at an elite level!

question: What is the championship series in MLB called?
explanation: The World Series is MLB's championship, played every October!

question: How many teams are in Major League Baseball?
explanation: There are 30 MLB teams, split into the American League and National League!

question: Which Dodgers player hit a walk-off grand slam in the 2024 World Series?
explanation: Freddie Freeman's walk-off grand slam in Game 1 was one of the greatest World Series moments ever!

question: Which team plays at Fenway Park, one of the oldest baseball stadiums?
explanation: Fenway Park in Boston opened in 1912 and is the oldest MLB stadium!

question: Which player won the 2024 American League MVP?
explanation: Aaron Judge won his second AL MVP after an incredible 2024 season!

question: Which player won the 2024 National League MVP?
explanation: Shohei Ohtani won NL MVP in his first season with the Dodgers, hitting 54 home runs and stealing 59 bases!

question: Which MLB team has won the most World Series titles ever?
explanation: The Yankees have won 27 World Series titles, the most in baseball history!

question: What milestone did Shohei Ohtani reach in 2024 that no player had ever done before?
options: 50 home runs and 50 stolen bases in one season
Pitching a perfect game in the World Series
correct_answer: 50 home runs and 50 stolen bases in one season
explanation: Ohtani became the first player ever to hit 50 homers and steal 50 bases in one season!

question: The Chicago Cubs play at which famous stadium?
explanation: Wrigley Field, built in 1914, is one of the most beloved ballparks in America!

question: Which young player won the 2024 AL Rookie of the Year?
explanation: Colton Cowser of the Baltimore Orioles won the 2024 AL Rookie of the Year!

question: Which team is known as 'America's Team' in baseball and plays in the Bronx?
explanation: The Yankees play at Yankee Stadium in the Bronx, New York!
